explanations.8: This line tells the browser to smoothly animate three properties (background color, text color, and border color) over 200 milliseconds whenever they change, creating a gentle fade effect rather than instant changes.
explanations.21: This resets a counter to zero so that the list items can be numbered automatically using the counter-increment property below.
explanations.26: This increases the counter by 1 for each list item, so the ::before pseudo-element can display auto-numbered labels (1, 2, 3, etc.).
explanations.36: This inserts the current counter value as text before each list item, creating automatic numbering without hardcoding the numbers.
explanations.63: This is a special selector that applies different styles only when the page is in dark mode, overriding the light mode styles above for better contrast.
